Onboard your property in under 5 minutes. ⚡

Step-by-step: from zero to a live digital guide your guests can scan with their phone camera.

What's inside this carousel ⤵️

• Sign up & confirm your email
• Pick your role (Owner)
• Add your first property
• Name, location, photos, guest capacity
• You're live — ready for Tutorial 02

Save this for when you're ready to set up. Comment ASK if anything's unclear and I'll walk you through it. 👇

Tutorial 02 is dropping next — we'll customize your guide so guests actually use it.

targets.name: @thestaylocalx
targets.caption:
We're live. 🚀

After months of building, Staylocalx is now available for property owners worldwide.

Here's the simple version:

• You have a vacation rental, villa, or short-term let
• Your guests always ask "where should we eat tonight?"
• Right now, those recommendations earn you nothing

Staylocalx fixes that. ⚡

You get a free digital guide your guests scan with their phone camera — no app to download, no friction. Local restaurants, activities, and services pay you a commission every time your guest actually visits (GPS-verified, so you only get paid for real foot traffic).

The split: 70% stays with you. Always.
Average potential: up to €500/mo in additional passive income.
Setup time: 5 minutes.

Tutorial 01 is live on this account if you want to see exactly how to onboard your first property.

If you've ever thought "I should be getting paid for these recommendations" — this is for you. 👇

Link in bio. Free to start.

#vacationrental #airbnbhost #shorttermrental #hostlife #vacationrentalowner #passiveincome #propertyowner #airbnbtips #hosttips #staylocalx #welive #launch

targets.name: @staylocalx.fr
targets.caption:
On y est. 🚀

Après des mois de développement, Staylocalx est désormais disponible pour les propriétaires de gîtes, chambres d'hôtes et locations saisonnières en Provence, sur la Côte d'Azur, en Bretagne, en Alsace et partout en France.

L'idée est simple :

• Vous avez un gîte, un appartement de vacances ou une chambre d'hôtes
• Vos hôtes vous demandent toujours « où dîner ce soir ? »
• Aujourd'hui, ces recommandations ne vous rapportent rien

Staylocalx change la donne. ⚡

Vous obtenez un guide digital gratuit que vos hôtes ouvrent avec l'appareil photo de leur téléphone — sans application à télécharger, sans friction. Restaurants, activités et services locaux vous versent une commission chaque fois que votre hôte les visite réellement (vérification par GPS, vous n'êtes payé que pour les visites réelles).

Répartition : 70% pour vous. Toujours.
Potentiel : jusqu'à €500/mois de revenus passifs supplémentaires.
Temps de configuration : 5 minutes.

Si vous avez déjà pensé « je devrais être rémunéré pour ces recommandations » — c'est pour vous. 👇

Lien en bio. C'est gratuit pour commencer.

#locationsaisonniere #gite #chambredhotes #airbnbfrance #provence #cotedazur #bretagne #alsace #revenuspassifs #staylocalx #lancement

targets.name: @thestaylocalx
targets.caption:
How often do your guests ask where to eat? 👇

We're collecting answers from hosts worldwide.

Every time a guest asks where to eat, it's free market research. They're showing you their intent. Their decision-making moment. Their willingness to spend.

And most hosts are giving away that intent for free.

Three answers below, then we'll share what we learned next week:

• Never – they figure it out themselves
• A few times a stay – I send a list once
• Constantly – they ask every single day

Drop a number 1, 2, or 3. 👇

targets.name: @staylocalx.app
targets.caption:
How to set up the live availability calendar — 30 seconds, no kidding. 📅

Most hosts pay Airbnb 15% commission on EVERY booking. Including the repeat guests who already love your place. That's leaked money.

This tutorial walks through the iCal calendar feature inside your Staylocalx app — the one that shows your real-time availability to guests scanning your QR guide, so when they want to come back they can book direct.

Steps recap:

1. Open your Staylocalx app → your property → Direct Booking Tools
2. Toggle "Show availability calendar" ON
3. Go to Airbnb: Listing → Calendar → Availability → Export calendar
4. Copy the iCal URL
5. Paste it in the Staylocalx app
6. Save

That's it. The calendar updates automatically forever. Works with Airbnb, Booking, Vrbo, Hostaway — any platform that exports iCal (which is all of them).

Read-only: it imports availability into your guide. It does NOT push direct bookings back to Airbnb — guests contact you directly via WhatsApp.

Save this for when you next open the app.

targets.name: @staylocalx.es
targets.caption:
Esta semana en Mallorca: más de 200 villas de lujo "secuestradas" por inquilinos que dejaron de pagar y ahora exigen un rescate para marcharse. 🏚️

El patrón es siempre el mismo: alquilan con contratos largos, se instalan, dejan de pagar. Y desalojar puede tardar años.

Aquí está el detalle que casi nadie comenta:

Esto le pasa al alquiler de larga duración. Casi nunca al alquiler vacacional de corta estancia.

¿Por qué? Porque un huésped que reserva 4 noches no se convierte en inquilino con derechos. Llega el viernes, se va el lunes. Rotación, no arraigo.

No es casualidad que cada vez más propietarios en zonas como Son Vida o Portals estén pasando de inquilinos de largo plazo a huéspedes de paso. Menos riesgo. Más control. Y, bien gestionado, más ingresos.

Si ya estás en corta estancia, el siguiente paso es profesionalizar la experiencia del huésped (y monetizarla). Link en la bio.

#alquilervacacional #mallorca #okupas #propiedadprivada #alquilerturistico #propietarioairbnb #inversioninmobiliaria #baleares #cortaestancia #staylocalx

targets.name: @thestaylocalx
targets.caption:
This week in Mallorca: 200+ luxury villas held hostage by tenants who stopped paying and now demand a ransom to leave. 🏚️

The pattern is always the same: they sign a long lease, move in, stop paying. And eviction can take years.

Here's the detail almost nobody points out:

This happens to long-term rentals. Almost never to short-stay vacation rentals.

Why? Because a guest who books 4 nights doesn't become a tenant with squatting rights. They arrive Friday, leave Monday. Rotation, not roots.

It's no coincidence that more owners in areas like Son Vida and Portals are shifting from long-term tenants to short-stay guests. Less risk. More control. And, done right, more income.

If you're already in short-stay, the next step is professionalizing the guest experience (and monetizing it). Link in bio.

targets.name: @staylocalx.es
targets.caption:
El Tribunal Supremo ha anulado el registro único estatal de alquileres de corta duración. 🏛️

Antes de lanzar las campanas al vuelo: esto NO significa que el registro desaparezca.

Lo que realmente ha pasado:

El Supremo anula el número de registro ESTATAL único — ese que se pedía para anunciar en plataformas a nivel nacional. ¿El motivo? El Estado invadía competencias autonómicas y duplicaba registros que ya existían.

Pero se mantiene la ventanilla única digital y la obligación de las plataformas de transmitir datos.

Y lo más importante: los registros AUTONÓMICOS siguen plenamente vigentes. En la mayoría de comunidades necesitas tu número autonómico para operar legalmente.

Traducción para el owner: no es vía libre. Cambia quién lleva el registro, no que tengas que registrarte. Sigue cumpliendo con tu comunidad autónoma.

Guarda este post para cuando te toque renovar.

targets.name: @thestaylocalx
targets.caption:
Spain's Supreme Court just struck down the country's national registry for short-term rentals. 🏛️

Before anyone celebrates: this does NOT mean registration disappears.

What actually happened:

The court annulled the single STATE-level registry number — the one required to list nationwide. The reason? The State was overstepping regional powers and duplicating registries that already existed.

But the digital single-window and platforms' data-sharing obligations stay in place.

And most importantly: REGIONAL registries remain fully in force. In most autonomous communities you still need your regional registration number to operate legally.

Translation for owners: it's not a free pass. It changes who runs the registry, not whether you need to register. Keep complying with your region.

If you own property in Spain, save this for your next renewal.
